scripts.dev: pnpm run --stream dev:web & pnpm run --stream dev:api
scripts.dev:tmux: tmux new-session -d -s hkrecruitment 'pnpm run dev:web' \; split-window -h -p 50 'pnpm run dev:api' \; attach
scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.preview: pnpm run --stream preview:web & pnpm run --stream preview:api
scripts.preview:tmux: tmux new-session -d -s hkrecruitment 'pnpm run preview:web' \; split-window -h -p 50 'pnpm run preview:api' \; attach
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter frontend clean && pnpm --filter api clean
scripts.format: pnpm --filter shared format & pnpm --filter frontend format & pnpm --filter api format
scripts.format-check: pnpm --filter shared format-check && pnpm --filter frontend format-check && pnpm --filter api format-check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter shared test
